whatsapp_message_start: Hello, I would like to inquire about this product:
about_intro: We are 'Like New', an online store and application officially licensed by the Ministry of Commerce in the State of Kuwait under number (7427), specializing in selling used smart devices carefully inspected by a specialized technical team.
about_commitment: We are committed to providing high-quality devices, and we pledge that all devices displayed on our website or accounts are:
about_point_tested: Tested rigorously according to the highest technical inspection standards
about_point_matching: Matching the description displayed on the site
about_trial_warranty: We also provide our customers with an initial trial warranty for 3 days during which the device can be tried, with the possibility of a full refund if any defect is found in the device or difference from the description, without any complication.
about_extended_warranty: We also offer an extended warranty for 3 months after purchase against malfunctions or technical defects not resulting from misuse.
about_conclusion: At 'Like New', we are keen to provide a unique, reliable, and safe experience in buying used devices, combining quality, transparency, and reasonable price, with our full commitment to the comfort and satisfaction of our customers.
privacy_section1_title: First: Terms of Use - Terms and Conditions of 'Like New' Application
privacy_section1_intro: Welcome to 'Like New' application. By using the application, you agree to abide by the following terms and conditions:
privacy_section1_1_text: 'Like New' is an electronic application that allows users to purchase carefully inspected used devices provided with a trial warranty and subsequent warranty.
privacy_section1_2_points: The customer receives a free trial period of 3 days from receiving the device, during which they have the right to inspect and try the device.
During this period, the customer has the right to return the device and receive a full refund in case of:
Existence of a technical or operational defect not mentioned previously.
Or a difference between the device and the specifications displayed in the application.
privacy_section1_3_points: After the trial period ends, and if the device is not returned, the sale is confirmed.
The customer automatically receives a 3-month warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects only.
privacy_section1_4_points: The warranty does not cover malfunctions resulting from misuse, drops, liquids, or attempts to open or modify the device.
'Like New' reserves the right to modify or update the conditions at any time, with notice to users within the application.
It is prohibited to use the application for any commercial, deceptive, or illegal purposes.
privacy_section2_title: Second: Privacy Policy - Personal Data and Its Protection 🔒
privacy_section2_intro: We at Like New strictly value your privacy, and clarify below how we collect and use your data:
privacy_section2_1_points: Full name, phone number, delivery address, and order details.
Electronic payment information is not stored within the application.
privacy_section2_2_points: Your data is used only to provide the service, deliver devices, and ensure the quality of your experience.
We do not sell or share your data with any third party without your permission, except as required by law.
privacy_section2_3_points: We use appropriate security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access or use.
'Like New' application keeps a log of operations for monitoring and improvement purposes.
privacy_section2_4_points: You have the right to request modification or deletion of your data from the system at any time by contacting customer service.
privacy_section3_1_points: Starts from the date of receiving the device.
Includes returning the device and refunding the full amount in case of discovering a defect not mentioned or difference in specifications.
Does not cover returning the device due to change of mind or incorrect use.
privacy_section3_2_points: Does not cover malfunctions resulting from:
Opening the device or attempting to repair it outside 'Like New'.
privacy_section3_3_points: The customer must communicate with support service during the warranty period.
The device will be inspected, and if a manufacturing defect is proven:
Repair or replacement is done for free depending on the case.

used_warning_title: Alert before adding a used product
used_warning_text_1: We care about customer trust, so we do not display any device that has been opened before or has had any part repaired or changed.
used_warning_text_2: If you have any doubt about the condition of the device, it is better to retreat before adding.
confirm_unopened: I confirm that the device is unopened and no part has been repaired.
agree_conditions_note: (By clicking Next you agree to the conditions above)
retreat_not_sure: Retreat not sure about device condition
